title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXX. Lullabies.
content:
Hushy baby, my doll, I pray you don't cry,
        And I'll give you some bread and some milk by and bye;
        Or, perhaps you like custard, or may-be a tart, - 
        Then to either you're welcome, with all my whole heart.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCLXXX. Lullabies."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
